name: TestWaitForAllJoinedEvents
title: TestWaitForAllJoinedEvents
description: Waits for the current set of "joined events." The wait condition is resolved if all of the joined events were signaled.
Should not all events occur before the expiration of the time aTimeout, the wait condition is resolved nevertheless.

parameters.name: aTimeout
parameters.description: Maximum time that should be waited [ms](Transmission of 0: no timeout controlling)

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
